# Maintainers

## Core Maintainer

- @thinkdj — architecture, releases, and final review

## Ownership Model

- High-level code ownership is enforced through [`CODEOWNERS`](./.github/CODEOWNERS).
- Package/domain maintainers may be expanded over time through pull request activity.

## Escalation

- Security escalation: follow [`SECURITY.md`](./SECURITY.md)
- General support: follow [`SUPPORT.md`](./SUPPORT.md)
